content.body: Hi folks, the scopes meeting is starting now!
For Stephen to attend the main TG4 meeting we'll need to make him a delegate, since that's a meeting where we can officially decide things. Justin Ridgewell could you take care of it?

content.body: Thanks all! Great to see so much interest :)
